name: Holocomfy (Mommy Edition)
description:
Finally found the time to finish up this variation of the Holocomfy bot, hopefully it works just as well as the last one. Just as an update I have no clue what to work on next, either a group bot themed after vtubers like Smugalana and Kirsche, maybe a HoloJP gen 2 bot or another EN gen bot, or just finally fix up some of my phase bots since they're not very good tbh, but I dunno lemme know which one you want in the comments I guess

And just like all the other bots I've done recently here's some gens of each of the girls in this bot.

Shishiro Botan

Ceres Fauna

Takanashi Kiara

Ouro Kronii

Yukihana Lamy

Hoshinova Moona

Nerissa Ravencroft

Shirogane Noel

And a bonus Ookami Mio

As always lemme know if something isn't working well and I hope you enjoy the bot.
creator: Pandapple
